name: launchpad-workspace
description: Product studio workspace with React, Express, Prisma, SQLite, authentication, dashboards, and operations workflows.

scripts.dev: npm run build -w @launchpad/shared && concurrently "npm run dev -w @launchpad/api" "npm run dev -w @launchpad/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @launchpad/shared && npm run build -w @launchpad/api && npm run build -w @launchpad/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @launchpad/shared && npm run typecheck -w @launchpad/api && npm run typecheck -w @launchpad/web
